posts.author: davelight (JaeHyeok Lee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Regarding the Emails & Activity integration, I understand that when using the “When Activity is created, create an item in the board and connect” automation, only data related to the activity can be brought into the designated board.

We would like to bring in column values of the associated item when an activity is created, rather than the activity data itself. However, it seems this option is not currently available. While I understand this cannot be implemented with the current E&A integration, is there any plan to add this functionality in the future? Alternatively, is there a workaround for this?

Thank you.
